name: Mudcloth
description: Bone-white marks hand-printed on near-black cloth — rows alternate dots, dashes and diamonds, each band re-inked by the next redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( /* one emitted ink and dot spacing per cell, shared by every mark in the row motif */ --ink: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --dd: calc(@r(150, 200) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { @match(y % 3 == 1) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: 20%; top: 43%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--ink); box-shadow: @var(--dd) 0 @var(--ink), calc(@var(--dd) * 2) 0 @var(--ink); transition: ease 600ms; } } @match(y % 3 == 2) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 9%; height: @rand(40%, 60%); left: 28%; top: 24%; background: @var(--ink); box-shadow: calc(@var(--dd) * 1.4) 0 @var(--ink); transform: rotate(@rand(-8deg, 8deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } @match(y % 3 == 0) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(22%, 32%); border: calc(30px / @Y) solid @var(--ink); transform: rotate(45deg) scale(@rand(0.8, 1.05)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
